    1. SalesAddEvent(World, Item, List)

Class SalesAddEvent

java.lang.Object
de.chojo.universalis.events.Event
de.chojo.universalis.events.sales.SalesEvent
de.chojo.universalis.events.sales.impl.SalesAddEvent
public class SalesAddEvent extends SalesEvent
Represents addition of added sales.

This date is deduplicated and will only contain new sales entries.
